result.stdout:
dotnet ts [options]
  Options:
  -s    , --swagger                  swagger file locate to use (default: /tmp/inspectra-help-onestrata.swaggertots-2.0.2-45cb6286ee4b43339443adda461ba8a3/swagger.json)
  -d    , --dist                     generated typescript file dir (default: /tmp/inspectra-help-onestrata.swaggertots-2.0.2-45cb6286ee4b43339443adda461ba8a3/apis)
  -i    , --ignore                   tags(displayed in swagger.html) to ignore (default: will not skip any tags)
  -m    , --match                    tags(displayed in swagger.html) to match (default: will include all tags)
  -p    , --printWidth               print width(same with configuration in prettier) to format (default: 80)
  -eUe  , --enumUseEnum              Convert enumerated types to const enum type (default: Convert enumerated types to union types)
  -inlineR, --inlineRequest          request parameter all in line
  -nnr  , --NonNullResponsePropertyAsRequiredif Response field is not null then make it required
  -h    , --help                     show all options
